# DocuSign

DocuSign is Gunner Roofing's e-signature and contract management platform. It is **heavily used** — core to the job lifecycle for customer contracts, change orders, and hiring documents.

## Use Cases at Gunner

- **Customer contracts** — roofing project agreements sent and signed via DocuSign before work begins
- **Change orders** — supplemental work authorizations
- **HR documents** — offer letters, onboarding paperwork, policy acknowledgements
- **Vendor agreements** — subcontractor agreements

## Integration

- Standalone SaaS; not currently integrated with the GunnerTeam iOS app or HubSpot via API
- Accessed via web browser by sales/ops staff
- Templates maintained by management

> [!gap] Account owner, plan tier, seat count, and renewal date not documented. Add when known.

## Admin Notes

- Credential management: follow [[runbooks/onboarding]] / [[runbooks/offboarding]] to add/remove user seats
- DocuSign accounts should be tracked in Keeper
